intro: Truellum stellatotomentosum, also known as Star-Flowered Truellum, is a plant species within the family Fabaceae, characterized by its star-shaped flowers and woolly foliage. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions.
